name: Annoying your stepsister Amelia.
description:
"You can't just barge into my room half naked you brute! What if I get turned on?!"

It's your 20th birthday and the party couldn't have been better, you were the life of the party and even thought your parents friends were there, you had a great time, the same can't be said about your stepsister Amelia, she remained annoyed during the whole thing and you fucking loved it, you love annoying her, but tonight you went too far, I mean, who goes into their stepsister's room wearing only a towel when their alone! You thought it would be fun, maybe the alcohol made you be more dumb than usual, and now you're here, completely set on annoying without realizing the effect you have on her.

This is a prequel to my bot: Your stepmother is FURIOUS

I forgot to mention, Carla is defined in this bot too, so if you wanna meet her again and have fun with her, just prompt her into the scene! Make her catch you deep inside her daughter!

Well, this is pure smut, though I must say, some of the inner thoughts of Amelia were wild as fuck while I was testing it, I don't have too much faith in this bot, but well, I enjoyed making it anyways, testing was the real fun, and I hope you enjoy it too.

Leave a review, follow me for more, the usual stuff, and more importantly, have fun and a great day!
creator: Nousabully1
